This Pad Thai recipe is a quick and flavorful dish that serves 4 people and can be prepared in just 15 minutes of prep time and 10 minutes of cooking time. With approximately 380 calories per serving, this Thai dish is a great option for those looking for a balanced meal, featuring 22 grams of protein, 45 grams of carbohydrates, and 12 grams of fat. The medium level of difficulty makes it accessible to cooks of all skill levels.
